description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden desk with a dark, textured top surface and a rich, reddish-brown finish. The front side features a set of three drawers on the left, each with a small round knob, providing ample storage space for office supplies or documents. The right side of the desk is open, allowing for comfortable legroom. The back and sides of the desk are solid panels, giving it a sturdy and professional appearance. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for a formal office or study environment. The desk's construction suggests durability and a classic aesthetic.
description: A large, dark wood desk with a textured top and three drawers on the left side, offering a sturdy and professional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers on the left and an open leg space on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the solid panel construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous solid wood panel with no visible drawers or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the drawers and the solid panel on the right.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and open leg space is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front of the desk.
